languages.text: "Поздравляю, Ведка. Ты получила то, о чем мечтала.".
"Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."
languages.original_text: "Поздравляю, Ведка. Ты получила то, о чем мечтала.".

traits.locale_text: "Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."
"Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."
"Well, congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of. Though I never believed it was even possible. It's going to be hard without you, but we'll manage."
"Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."
"Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."

languages.text: 「まあ、おめでとう、ヴェドカ。夢を叶えたな。まさか実現するとは思っていなかった。お前がいなくなると大変だが、何とかやっていけるさ」
languages.original_text: "Well, congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of. Though I never believed it was even possible. It's going to be hard without you, but we'll manage."

traits.locale_text: 「まあ、おめでとう、ヴェドカ。夢を叶えたな。まさか実現するとは思っていなかった。お前がいなくなると大変だが、何とかやっていけるさ。」

languages.text: « Félicitations, Vedka. Votre rêve s'est réalisé. »
languages.original_text: "Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."

traits.locale_text: « Félicitations, Vedka. Votre rêve s'est réalisé. »

languages.text: "Tebrikler Vedka. Hayalini kurduğun şeyi elde ettin."
languages.original_text: "Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."

traits.locale_text: "Tebrikler Vedka. Hayalini kurduğun şeyi elde ettin."

languages.text: "Glückwunsch, Vedka. Ihr habt bekommen, wovon Ihr immer geträumt habt."
languages.original_text: "Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."

traits.locale_text: "Glückwunsch, Vedka. Ihr habt bekommen, wovon Ihr immer geträumt habt."

languages.text: «Enhorabuena, Vedka, su sueño se ha cumplido».
languages.original_text: "Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."

traits.locale_text: «Enhorabuena, Vedka, su sueño se ha cumplido».

languages.text: “恭喜你，薇德卡。你如愿以偿了。”
languages.original_text: "Congratulations, Vedka. You got what you dreamed of."

traits.locale_text: “恭喜你，薇德卡。你如愿以偿了。”
